text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while out and about with
Matikanetannhauser...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ah! Look, Trainer! They've got Cuties!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser points toward a claw
machine filled with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Aren't they adorable? Just seeing them makes me
want one!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I already decided that I want to get a
stuffed spider today, so I'll just have to be
patient...
choice_data_list: Why don't I get one for you?
Why don't I get one for you?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ohh! Oh, oh, oh! Are you sure?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, thank you! Good luck, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
